ham: Dear student, this is a reminder that the assignment for Course X is due on 12th April 2026. Please submit through the university portal by 11:59 PM on the deadline. Let me know if you need any clarification.
spam: Hey! You have been shortlisted for a remote job that pays 5k per month. Join our team now and start earning. Click <URL> to apply. Hurry, spots are limited! Reply YES for details.
